title: DNA Isolation from EDTA-blood
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"buv4g","text":"Whole blood collected in EDTA vials (9-10mL) is processed to remove the erythrocytes before salting out the total DNA for long term storage at 4 deg C.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Discard supernatant (in sink) and put the Falcon tube containing the cell pellet upside down onto a tissue (to dry).
Centrifuge 10 minutes at 4°C at 1700rpm (600g) in The Eppendorf 5810R centrifuge.
Store for 10 minutes at -20 °C
Fill the Falcon tube again with Erylysis-Buffer up to 30 mL and shake until the cell pellethas dissolved.
· Discard supernatant (in special waste container) All blood product waste should be treated according to local guidelines.

1700 rpm, 4 °C, Centrifuge 10 minutes (1700rpm or 600g) Centrifuge 5810 R (Refrigerated centrifuge, Eppendorf, 5811000065, https://www.eppendorf.com/gb-en/eShop-Products/Centrifugation/Multipurpose-Centrifuges/Centrifuge-5810-5810R-p-PF-240994 )
Store for 10 minutes at -20 °C

Transfer whole blood from 9 mL S-Monovette®, K3 EDTA Sarstedt Catalog #02.1066.001 vial into 50 mL Falcon Falcon tube 50 ml Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #1443222 and fillwith Erylysis buffer (see materials tab) up to 50 mL volume.
Add 5 mL SE-Buffer (see materials tab) and vortex vigorously until pellet has dissolved
Add 500 µL 10% SDS-Buffer and 5 µL Proteinase K (20mg/ml) and vortex again.
Store tube at 37 °C overnight or at Room temperature for 3 days.
Add 2.5ml NaCl (5M) and vortex until it foams.
Centrifuge 10 minutes at 4°C at 2700rpm in The Eppendorf 5810R

If pellet is sharply defined, transfer supernatant into a new 50 mL Falcon tube, that has been previously filled with 15 mL 100% Ethanol. (If pellet is not sharply seen, then add 500 µL NaCL (5M), vortex again and centrifugeagain).
Rotate tube gently overhead to see DNA precipitating.
Fish the DNA to the side and discard the Ethanol.
Add 15 mL 70% Ethanol and gently shake.
Fish the DNA to the side and discard the Ethanol.
Add 15 mL 70%Ethanol and gently shake.
Transfer DNA to Cryotube (with pipette tip) and let it dry at roomtemperature.
Add 400 µL TE-Buffer (1X, see Materials tab) and shake at room temperature for at least 30minutes.
Measure DNA
Store at 4 °C
creator: Julia Fitzgerald
